_comment: Reasonix 0.53.x only fires PreToolUse and PostToolUse (no UserPromptSubmit/Stop). PreToolUse → blocked for edit_file/write_file (detected from stdin), otherwise working. PostToolUse → deferred idle: sleeps 3s then sends idle to herdr (cancelled by next PreToolUse). Shell wrapper sends release on exit.

PreToolUse.description: herdr: report working before each tool call

PostToolUse.description: herdr: report idle after each tool call (best approximation: reasonix 0.53 doesn't fire Stop)
